top_signals.title: American Express and Chase move luxury lounge wars beyond the airport
top_signals.summary: Credit card companies are increasingly offering access to lounges and perks at festivals and sporting events, often exclusively for premium cardholders.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
